claimText: The National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) issued the Biological Diversity (Access and Benefit Sharing) Regulation 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: The National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) has issued the new Biological Diversity (Access and Benefit Sharing) Regulation 2025.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the regulatory body responsible for issuing the Access and Benefit Sharing Regulation 2025.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)
